subject: New Request: Software Engineer – TypeScript
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the fintech sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a lead Software Engineer with strong experience in TypeScript. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:

  • TypeScript
  • Azure
  • Kubernetes

Details:
Client: SwiftLedger
Start: ASAP
Duration: 18 months
Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
Rate: up to 1025 SEK/h

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Erik Lindqvist
Account Manager
NordStaff AB
Tel: +46 70 987 65 43
